mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, level, category, issuer, award_date, description, certificate_url, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO achievements (user_id, name, level, category, issuer, award_date, description, certificate_url) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{level}, #{category}, #{issuer}, #{awardDate}, #{description}, #{certificateUrl})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM achievements WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
